headline: Assessing Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Valuation After A Mixed Period For Shareholder Returns
summary: Event overview and recent share performance Verisk Analytics (VRSK) shares closed at US$201.75 on the latest trading day, giving the insurance data and analytics specialist a market value of about US$27.8b and setting the stage for a closer look at recent returns. See our latest analysis for Verisk Analytics. Recent trading has been mixed, with a 10.6% 1 month share price return contrasting with an 8.7% year to date share price decline and a 28.7% 1 year total shareholder return loss. This...
